'''Nystammall''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Vuvrian/Legends|Vuvrian]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Brought to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] after being identified as [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Nystammall entered into the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]] and began learning the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduating]], he was selected by the [[Eirrauc]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Puroth]] to study as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] together, Nystammall constructed a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] for his personal use for the rest of his career. Master Puroth trained the young Vuvrian for years before recommending him to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] as ready to take his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]. Passing the Trials presented to him, Nystammall was elevated to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|High Council]].<ref name="US" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Nystammall and his former Master reported to Coruscant and took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] to combat the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist horde]]. Fighting valiantly throughout the war and earning the rank of Master, the Jedi pair were stationed at [[Tovarskl]] when the world was [[Battle of Tovarskl|attacked]] by Confederacy [[General/Legends|General]], the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]. The former Master-Padawan duo fought bravely against the General, but both were slain. Grievous took possession of Nystammall's lightsaber, carrying it as a trophy for the rest of the war. At the end of the war, Grievous wielded Nystammall and Puroth's weapons against Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. While Kenobi was able to kill the [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] cyborg, the weapons were never recovered.<ref name="US" />
